name: mcp-watchtower
description: Static analysis and compatibility checks for MCP servers

scripts.build: tsc && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const sleep=(ms)=>Atomics.wait(new Int32Array(new SharedArrayBuffer(4)),0,0,ms); const replaceDir=(source,target)=>{ for(let attempt=0; attempt<20; attempt+=1){ try { fs.rmSync(target,{recursive:true,force:true}); fs.cpSync(source,target,{recursive:true}); return; } catch(error){ if(attempt===19){ throw error; } sleep(100); } } }; fs.copyFileSync('src/analyzers/shadow-patterns.json', 'dist/src/analyzers/shadow-patterns.json'); for (const dir of ['analyzers','crawler','embeddings','index-builder']) { const source=`dist/src/${dir}`; const target=`dist/${dir}`; if (fs.existsSync(source)) { replaceDir(source, target); } }"
scripts.crawl-and-embed: npm run crawl && npm run embed
scripts.full-build: npm run crawl && npm run embed && npm run build-index
